title: Heavy Duty Tape Measure
summary: Heavy duty tape measure manufacturer for OEM tool brands, with shock-resistant rubber case, high-carbon steel blade, custom logo, shell color, packaging, and flexible MOQ support.
sellingPoints: Shock-resistant rubber case for jobsite use
High-carbon steel blade with clear markings
OEM logo, color and packaging support

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Custom logo sticker and Pantone color accepted

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

quality: Blade printing and measurement readability check
Locking, retraction and hook function test
Case assembly, belt clip and lanyard inspection
Packaging, barcode and carton mark review
targetBuyers: Global importers, hardware distributors, construction tool wholesalers, and private-label hand tool brands
